active.title: 🎯 Crypto Signals — Win Rate Tracker LIVE
active.notes: Win rate tracker deployed and resolving outcomes. First batch: 187 outcomes resolved (31.0% win, 25.7% loss, 43.3% neutral). Both engines writing to DB. Phase 2 (dashboard + macro filter) ready for approval.

active.title: ✅ Jason's Crypto Signals — FIXED: Zero→13 Alerts/Cycle
active.notes: Problem: 4 over-aggressive gates stacked (MEDIUM threshold, neutral filter, single-source requirement, state-change detection) = zero Telegram sends. Fix: Removed all gates, replaced with score≥45 + 5-min cooldown. Result: 13 alerts/cycle flowing to Telegram. Continuous smart alerts resumed.

active.title: 🚀 Crypto Signals — 1000x Improvement Plan (Phase 2-4)
active.notes: Phase 1 complete (frozen + telegram-silent signals fixed). Phase 2-4 awaiting Jason's go-ahead: (2) Signal quality: Win rate dashboard + macro correlation filter, (3) New alpha sources: OKX/Bybit funding + order book + whale tracking, (4) Architecture: Event-driven + tiered cadence.
